GeneralComments:
Founded in 2013, La Piazza Continental Café & Restaurant is known for revolutionizing the way families eat and enjoy food. We offer something special to everyone, from our delectable dishes to our incredible Bambini Kids Entertainment area.
Come and share our love of Italian food around our gorgeous piazza.
We  would love to make your family part of our familia!
